text: The department may adopt rules necessary to administer this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.005 — Rulemaking Authority

The department may adopt rules necessary to administer this chapter.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.72, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The department may adopt rules necessary to administer this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.72, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
